title: The empirically inscrutable climate-economy relationship
subtitle: From Finbar Curtin and Matthew G. Burgess, here is the paper. Here is the thread, worth a read. Important stuff, I hope to hear more about this. The whole climate to gdp transmission thing does not seem to be working very well? The post The empirically inscrutable climate-economy relationship appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
From Finbar Curtin and Matthew G. Burgess, here is the paper.  Here is the thread, worth a read.  Important stuff, I hope to hear more about this.  The whole climate to gdp transmission thing does not seem to be working very well?

The post The empirically inscrutable climate-economy relationship appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
